name: poggioai-msc
description: Autonomous multi-agent research pipeline: hypothesis to conference-grade manuscript in one command. Runs persona debate, adversarial lit review, parallel theory+experiment tracks, 12-pass writeup with AI-voice detection, and editorial quality gates.
author: PoggioAI

consortiumPath.description: Path to existing consortium installation. Empty = auto-install to ~/.openclaw/poggioai-msc/repo

condaEnvName.description: Conda environment name for the Python backend

defaultPreset.description: Default quality preset when no flags given

defaultModel.description: Default LLM model for max-quality preset

defaultBudgetUsd.description: Default budget cap in USD per run

progressPollIntervalMs.description: How often to poll pipeline progress (milliseconds)

steeringBasePort.description: Base port for consortium callback server (steering = port + 1)

uploadTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in ms for the file upload prompt before pipeline launch (0 = skip)
